meta.title: A Tour of the Skunk Works of Air Force Pilot Training--Detachment 24
meta.description:
The innovation engine behind how the Air Force trains it's pilots.


Free Newsletter with occasional patch giveaways: https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/newsletter

SUBSCRIBE for regular videos▶ https://www.youtube.com/c/HasardLee

HOW TO CONNECT
LinkedIn-- https://www.linkedin.com/in/hasardlee
Instagram-- https://www.instagram.com/hasardlee/
Facebook--https://www.facebook.com/hasardlee
Email--hasard@hasardlee(dot)com

🎙 Listen to the Podcast-- https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/listen

HASARD
F-35 fighter pilot in the U.S. Air Force Reserve. Previously flew the F-16, including 82 combat missions. 

*Approved and adheres to AFI 1-1, USAF Social Media Policy. For questions reach out to 19AF PA. Opinions do not represent the United States Air Force or any other organization*
